mapper.select: select * from owner where status=1 order by owner_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into owner (owner_name, phone, email, address, remark, status) values (#{ownerName}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{address}, #{remark}, 1)
mapper.delete: update owner set status=0 where owner_id=#{id}
mapper.update: update owner set status=#{status}, update_time=now() where owner_id=#{id}
